requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (Moroccan NM standard adopting IEC 60335-2-24, IMANOR)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（摩洛哥采纳IEC 60335-2-24的NM标准，IMANOR）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（摩洛哥採納IEC 60335-2-24的NM標準，IMANOR）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances sold in Morocco must satisfy electrical-safety requirements based on the Moroccan NM standard adopting IEC 60335-2-24 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), read with the NM standard adopting IEC 60335-1 (general requirements). IMANOR (Institut Marocain de Normalisation) is the national standards body that adopts IEC/EN texts as NM standards and operates the NM conformity mark. Morocco's electrical grid is 220 V, 50 Hz single-phase nominal — the same 50 Hz as China and a similar single-phase nominal voltage, so the appliance is electrically suited without re-engineering for frequency. Demonstration of safety conformity is typically through IMANOR product certification (NM mark) or a conformity attestation accepted under the Ministry of Industry and Trade import-control scheme (see the market-access rows). Core technical content mirrors IEC 60335-2-24: protection against electric shock, insulation resistance and dielectric strength, earthing continuity, creepage/clearance distances, thermal cut-outs, mechanical strength, and markings.
summary.zh: 在摩洛哥销售的家用制冷器具须满足以摩洛哥采纳IEC 60335-2-24的NM标准为基础的电气安全要求（家用和类似用途电器的安全——第2-24部分：制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），并与采纳IEC 60335-1的NM标准（通用要求）结合使用。IMANOR（摩洛哥标准化协会）为国家标准机构，将IEC/EN文本采纳为NM标准并运营NM符合性标志。摩洛哥电网为220 V、50 Hz单相额定——与中国同为50 Hz且单相额定电压相近，因此无需为频率重新设计即可适配。安全符合性通常通过IMANOR产品认证（NM标志）或工业和贸易部进口管制方案下接受的符合性证明加以证明（详见市场准入行）。核心技术内容与IEC 60335-2-24一致：防触电保护、绝缘电阻与介电强度、接地连续性、爬电距离/电气间隙、热断路器、机械强度及标识。
summary.zht: 在摩洛哥銷售的家用製冷器具須滿足以摩洛哥採納IEC 60335-2-24的NM標準為基礎的電氣安全要求（家用和類似用途電器的安全——第2-24部分：製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），並與採納IEC 60335-1的NM標準（通用要求）結合使用。IMANOR（摩洛哥標準化協會）為國家標準機構，將IEC/EN文本採納為NM標準並運營NM符合性標誌。摩洛哥電網為220 V、50 Hz單相額定——與中國同為50 Hz且單相額定電壓相近，因此無需為頻率重新設計即可適配。安全符合性通常通過IMANOR產品認證（NM標誌）或工業和貿易部進口管制方案下接受的符合性證明加以證明（詳見市場准入行）。核心技術內容與IEC 60335-2-24一致：防觸電保護、絕緣電阻與介電強度、接地連續性、爬電距離/電氣間隙、熱斷路器、機械強度及標識。

standards_or_laws: NM standard adopting IEC 60335-2-24 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (IMANOR national adoption)
NM standard adopting IEC 60335-1 — General requirements (read in conjunction)
IMANOR (Institut Marocain de Normalisation) — national standards body operating the NM conformity mark

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with Chinese national deviations, read with GB 4706.1 (general requirements). GB 4706.13 is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime; products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated certification body before domestic sale. Because both GB 4706.13 and the Moroccan NM standard descend from the same IEC 60335-2-24 base, the engineering is closely aligned — but a Chinese CCC certificate is not, by itself, accepted as Moroccan conformity evidence.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010并含中国国家偏差，与GB 4706.1（通用要求）结合使用。GB 4706.13为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度执行；产品须经CNCA指定认证机构完成CCC认证方可在国内销售。由于GB 4706.13与摩洛哥NM标准同源于IEC 60335-2-24，工程内容高度接近——但中国CCC证书本身不被接受为摩洛哥符合性证据。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010並含中國國家偏差，與GB 4706.1（通用要求）結合使用。GB 4706.13為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度執行；產品須經CNCA指定認證機構完成CCC認證方可在國內銷售。由於GB 4706.13與摩洛哥NM標準同源於IEC 60335-2-24，工程內容高度接近——但中國CCC證書本身不被接受為摩洛哥符合性證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: The technology gap is small because both regimes descend from IEC 60335-2-24, but the conformity-evidence gap is real: (1) Moroccan market access requires evidence against the NM-adopted IEC 60335-2-24 text — typically an IMANOR product certificate (NM mark) or a conformity attestation accepted by the Ministry of Industry and Trade import-control scheme; a Chinese CCC certificate to GB 4706.13 is not auto-recognised. (2) IEC 60335-2-24 base test reports from an IECEE CB-Scheme NCB (the international scheme Morocco's NM standard tracks) are the most portable evidence and may materially reduce duplicate testing — manufacturers should confirm acceptance and any Morocco-specific deviations with IMANOR or an accredited conformity-assessment body. (3) Documentation must be furnished in a language accepted by Moroccan authorities (typically Arabic and/or French), and markings/instructions adapted accordingly.
gap.zh: 技术差距较小（两套制度均源自IEC 60335-2-24），但符合性证据差距确实存在：（1）摩洛哥市场准入须提供针对NM采纳的IEC 60335-2-24文本的证据——通常为IMANOR产品证书（NM标志）或工业和贸易部进口管制方案接受的符合性证明；中国针对GB 4706.13的CCC证书不被自动认可。（2）由IECEE CB体系NCB出具的IEC 60335-2-24基础检测报告（摩洛哥NM标准所对标的国际体系）是最具可移植性的证据，可显著减少重复检测——制造商应就接受程度及摩洛哥特定偏差与IMANOR或认可的合格评定机构确认。（3）文件须以摩洛哥主管机构接受的语言（通常为阿拉伯语和/或法语）提供，标识/说明书须相应调整。
gap.zht: 技術差距較小（兩套制度均源自IEC 60335-2-24），但符合性證據差距確實存在：（1）摩洛哥市場准入須提供針對NM採納的IEC 60335-2-24文本的證據——通常為IMANOR產品證書（NM標誌）或工業和貿易部進口管制方案接受的符合性證明；中國針對GB 4706.13的CCC證書不被自動認可。（2）由IECEE CB體系NCB出具的IEC 60335-2-24基礎檢測報告（摩洛哥NM標準所對標的國際體系）是最具可移植性的證據，可顯著減少重複檢測——製造商應就接受程度及摩洛哥特定偏差與IMANOR或認可的合格評定機構確認。（3）文件須以摩洛哥主管機構接受的語言（通常為阿拉伯語和/或法語）提供，標識/說明書須相應調整。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — electrical-safety conformity to the NM standard adopting IEC 60335-2-24 is required for Moroccan market access, evidenced via IMANOR certification (NM mark) or an accepted conformity attestation under the Ministry of Industry and Trade import-control scheme
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification under GB 4706.13-2014 required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical-safety conformity to the Moroccan NM standard adopting IEC 60335-2-24 is mandatory for household refrigerators entering Morocco. Chinese CCC certification to GB 4706.13 is not auto-accepted; demonstrate conformity via IMANOR certification (NM mark) or an accepted attestation. Because both standards derive from IEC 60335-2-24, an IECEE CB-Scheme report may materially reduce duplicate testing — confirm acceptance and any Morocco-specific deviations with IMANOR.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据摩洛哥采纳IEC 60335-2-24的NM标准的电气安全符合性是家用电冰箱进入摩洛哥的强制要求。中国针对GB 4706.13的CCC认证不被自动接受；须通过IMANOR认证（NM标志）或被接受的证明证明符合性。由于两套标准均源自IEC 60335-2-24，IECEE CB体系报告可显著减少重复检测——请与IMANOR确认接受程度及摩洛哥特定偏差。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據摩洛哥採納IEC 60335-2-24的NM標準的電氣安全符合性是家用電冰箱進入摩洛哥的強制要求。中國針對GB 4706.13的CCC認證不被自動接受；須通過IMANOR認證（NM標誌）或被接受的證明證明符合性。由於兩套標準均源自IEC 60335-2-24，IECEE CB體系報告可顯著減少重複檢測——請與IMANOR確認接受程度及摩洛哥特定偏差。
